title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.322 - Buzz Westfall Memorial Highway designated for a portion of Route 364 in St. Louis County
text:
227.322.  Buzz Westfall Memorial Highway designated for a portion of Route 364 in St. Louis County. — The portion of Missouri Route 364 in St. Louis County from Interstate Highway 270 to the crossing of the Missouri River, known as the Veterans Memorial Bridge, being that portion of Route 364 extending from station 31+386.04 to station 23+292, shall be designated the "Buzz Westfall Memorial Highway".  The Buzz Westfall memorial highway shall not include any portion of the Veterans Memorial Bridge.
(L. 2004 S.B. 1006)
